key.name: update-interval
key.description: How often to fetch usage data from the API (in minutes)

key.name: usage-source
key.description: How to obtain usage stats. 'oauth' calls /api/oauth/usage (no token cost, tight rate limit). 'probe' POSTs a 1-token /v1/messages and reads anthropic-ratelimit-unified-* response headers (rarely rate-limited, costs ~1 token/fetch).
